prompting.responds_best_to: Tightly scoped tasks with explicit format; direct phrasing.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Be concise and return only the requested output in the specified format.

quirks: Reasoning-capable but lightweight — good cheap workhorse in the xAI stack
Same casual default tone as Grok 3 — constrain it
Keep calls atomic; coherence drops on long multi-part tasks

handoff.output_format_instruction: Demand strict format and supply one example.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Verify completeness; escalate to Grok 3 or a flagship if the task needed depth.
